title: taraxacum pseudonutans
intro: Taraxacum pseudonutans, also known as the lesser hawk's beard or lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain inulin and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum pseudonutans include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and it is often used as a dietary supplement to support overall well-being.
